name: @paradigm-terra/orchestrator
description: Deterministic multi-tick node/orchestrator (CAL Exec Spec §6 serialization, §7 reducer, CE §6.3 global Merkle root): folds a program of per-tick CAL submissions through the validator -> reducer pipeline over a single evolving State, records every per-event STATE_ROOT and the per-tick global stream Merkle root, and is byte-for-byte replayable. Pure; consumes execution traces (does not execute).
